caption: A man with dark hair, wearing a dark blazer over a light-colored button-down shirt, is seated at a table in front of a branded white backdrop. The backdrop features blue cube logos and the text "#BigDataSV 2015" and "the CUBE". On the table in front of him is a white laptop with a blue cube logo on its lid and a clear plastic water bottle. The man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. Initially, he looks forward with a slight smile, then transitions to a more serious expression while speaking. He eventually looks slightly to his left and gestures with his right hand open and extended. Throughout the sequence, his position remains constant, while his facial expressions and hand movements evolve as he continues to talk.
